name: Openmart
highlight_text: __POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__Best suited for: Bulk local business extraction and basic enrichment
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Openmart Does

Openmart sits closer to the scraping and data-extraction category. It offers a fast way to pull local business information from Google Maps, enrich it, and export it for outbound use. Agencies that focus on volume-based prospecting sometimes use tools like this to build big top-of-funnel lists before cleaning them in secondary tools. However, it doesn't have the audit intelligence and deeper marketing context needed to pitch higher-priced SMB retainers.

Source: Openmart

Key Features

  • Local Businesses Extractor for pulling Google Maps data into CSV or XLSX
  • Real-time Extraction for faster list building
  • 200M+ verified local business records worldwide
  • Unlimited Searches for continuous prospecting
  • Local Business Data API with 40+ data fields
  • AI enrichments, including website checks, social profiles, and verified emails

Benefits of Openmart

  • Minimizes the risk of emailing dead leads or using outdated information
  • The local business data API enables seamless, real-time data flow directly into your CRM
  • An affordable way to collect large volumes of local business records
  • Useful enrichment tools to clean basic lists
  • Straightforward CSV/Excel export options

Pricing

Openmart offers a free tier for testers.

  • Starter: $149 per month
  • Pro: $299 per month
  • Scale: $999 per month

You can avail discounted pricing by choosing to bill annually.

Pros

✅ Provides quality leads and support at an affordable price.

✅ Features like data enrichment and website scraping are highly effective.

Cons

🚫 Not made for pitching higher-priced SMB retainers

🚫 Lacks specialized local digital audit features.

🚫 Not many customer reviews/only review hosted on Trustpilot is very negative. 

‍
